raw_responses.title: ToneUnit: Speech Discretization for Tonal Language Speech Synthesis (2024/06)
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: SSL encoder + quantization module + tonal phone decoder; phone sequences with TONE MARKERS as target labels for fine-tuning via CTC loss; compels quantizer to generate tone-aware speech units.
